case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. HUNG C CHENG

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $380.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100042783) AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, HUNG C
